effect_text: While defending, you may exhaust this card to spend 1 defense token that your opponent targeted with an Accuracy result.
timing_notes: Exhausts and triggers during Attack Step 4: Spend Defense Tokens.
Armada 1.5 changed this card from Recur to non-Recur with a Repair token ready cost.
errata: Armada 1.5 changed this card from Recur to non-Recur. It now costs 1 Repair command token to ready during the Status Phase.
clarifications: This effect does not allow spending a defense token while at speed 0.
This effect does not allow spending a defense token type already spent during the attack.
This effect does not allow spending the same defense token more than once during an attack.

rules_integration.notes: Static catalog metadata only; gameplay rule integration is deferred to RuleRegistry.

rule_surfaces.summary: Allow the defender to exhaust this card and spend one accuracy-targeted defense token if all normal token spending rules still allow it.
Require 1 Repair command token to ready this non-Recur card.
